title: Bridge Essay: Towards the neurobiology of insomnia: A systematic review of neuroimaging studies.
concept: Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.

**Towards the neurobiology of insomnia: A systematic review of neuroimaging studies.** - Sleep Med Rev (2024). DOI: 10.1016/j.smrv.2023.101878. PMID: 38056381. Insomnia disorder signifies a major public health concern. The development of neuroimaging techniques has permitted to investigate brain mechanisms at a structural and functional level. The present systematic review aims at shedding light on functional, structural, and metabolic substrates of insomnia disorder by integrating the available published neuroimaging data.
